import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { CreditCard, CheckCircle, Play, Shield, Users, Star, Loader } from 'lucide-react'; import axios from 'axios'; function App() { const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ nome: '', email: '', senha: '' }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false); const handleChange = (e) => { setFormData({ ...formData, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }); }; const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); setError(''); try { const response = await axios.post('/api/registro', formData); // Redirecionar para página de pagamento do Mercado Pago window.location.href = response.data.payment_url; } catch (err) { setError(err.response?.data?.detail || 'Erro ao processar cadastro'); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; return (
